{{Quote|As if they weren't ugly enough already...|Lando Calrissian|<ref name="TNEG">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>}}
'''Vonduun Skerr Kyrric''', more commonly known as the '''Vonduun crab armor''' (also called '''Vonduun crabshell armor'''), was a bioengineered crab-shell-plated [[Armor/Legends|armor]] used by the [[Warrior caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. The armor was made from the living shell of the [[Vonduun crab/Legends|Vonduun crab]].

==Technical details==
[[File:Kray-2006Legacy1.jpg|thumb|left|180px|[[Darth Krayt]] with his vonduun crab armor]]

The vonduun crab's spear-like legs were extremely sharp, and could be used as weapons. One set, called "grip legs", would sometimes grab the corner of the wearer's mouth, giving them an evil, skull-like smile. Vonduun crab armor had crystalline properties, and was resistant to [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]], [[Slugthrower/Legends|slugthrowers]], and even [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]]. Certain varieties were known to augment the wearers' strength, as was the case with the elderly former [[Warmaster]] [[Czulkang Lah]] and his aged vonduun crab armor.

[[Color/Legends|Color]] could vary from armor to armor, black being the most common, but cerulean and red being also witnessed several times.

==Advantages==
[[File:Yuuzhan_Vong_pilot.jpg|thumb|right|180px|A Yuuzhan Vong pilot in vonduun crab armor.]]
Vonduun crab armor was extremely durable, as it could easily stop blaster hits, slugthrowers, and even lightsaber strikes. It was not that heavy, so most warriors could move quickly if needed. The spikes on the armor were also capable of being used as weapons of last resort, if they were used properly.

==Weaknesses==
The armor was not powerful enough to withstand [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] fire, nor could it withstand the strength of [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Crushgaunt/Legends|crushgaunts]], which would crack and break the armor with the continuous application of pressure.<ref name="Boba Fett: A Practical Man">''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]''</ref> The creature's gills were found in the armpit of the armored suit, thus leaving a weak point. In some cases, the wearer's face was not covered by the armor. As the armor was a living creature, it was subject to a living creature's problems and was found to be dangerously allergic to the [[Bafforr tree]] pollen, discovered during the [[Battle of Garqi]]. The armor could also be destroyed by [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]].

==History==
Non-[[Yuuzhan Vong]] could wear the armor, though capturing it alive was rare, as subduing or killing the armor's wearer typically required first wounding or killing the armor itself. During the [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; Second)|Battle of Borleias]], [[Danni Quee]] and [[Wraith Squadron]] members [[Baljos Arnjak]] and [[Bhindi Drayson]] wore captured, living vonduun crab armor. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Mara Jade Skywalker]], and other members of the group wore inanimate synthetic vonduun crab armor composed of [[Plasteel/Legends|plasteel]].

Modified versions of this armor were in use by the [[New Jedi Order]] by the time of [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] in dueling practice, as it could deflect lightsaber hits. Apprentices such as [[Ben Skywalker]] would wear the armor to guard against serious injury during lightsaber practice duels. During one such exercise, Luke Skywalker ordered Ben to remove the armor.

[[Darth Krayt]], [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] of the [[One Sith]], wore Vonduun crab armor after escaping [[Vergere]] in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]. He wore this armor until his death in [[137 ABY]]. After Krayt's resurrection, his armor was destroyed by [[Darth Wyyrlok (III)|Darth Wyyrlok]].
